visual_logic: A lone figure in a hall of mirrors whose reflections show only crowds of mutually connected people — never the figure itself. Structural peripherality made inevitable and inescapable by the geometry of the space.
prompt: A solitary figure stands alone in an infinite hall of mirrors, seen from behind. Every mirror reflects not the figure's own reflection but crowds of people facing each other in warm conversation, their backs never turned outward. The lone figure's silhouette appears only in the foreground — singular, peripheral, unreflected. Deep chiaroscuro lighting, dramatic shadows, cinematic. Photorealistic oil painting style. No text. No numbers. --ar 3:4 --style raw --stylize 300
